nodes.itemHTML: • Practical MongoDB Aggregations - How to develop effective and optimal data manipulation and analytics pipelines

• UrbanSimstars369 - UrbanSim is a platform for building statistical models of cities and regions. These models help forecast long-range patterns in real estate development, demographics, and related outcomes, under various policy scenarios. Information: License: BSD License: Provider: UrbanSim Inc. (UDST).
• Sveltestars263 - Linting rules for Svelte v3 Components.

• StartBootstrap.Freelancer.Blazorstars3 - Freelancer is a bootstrap template ideal for small portfolio web sites. It's powered by Kentico Kontent - a headless CMS with a comprehensive ecosystem for .NET developers.
• Blazor MealPlannerstars0 - MealPlanner is developed in Blazor Web Assembly PWA (offline), The app is using local storage for storing the meal plans. (Demo AzureStaticWeb) (Demo Github Pages)
• Blazor in depth — Create Blazor component without Lifecycle methods - October 16, 2020 - Blazor in depth — Create Blazor component without Lifecycle methods.
• BlazorLocalizationSample The default project template localized using XLocalizerstars65 with online translation and auto resource creating.
• XLocalizerstars65 - Easily localize Asp.Net Core web applications with online translation and auto resource creating.
• Blazor.Ionicstars7 - Ionic framework integration for Blazor.
• CountDown Timerstars0 - Count down timer with Browser notification and PWA using Blazor WebAssembly. Demo.
• TabBlazorstars49 - Blazor Admin theme built on top of Tabler UIstars23.7k. Minimal javascript. Demo.
• BlazorIntersectionObserverstars12 - This is a wrapper around the Intersection Observer API.

• Blazor Controls Toolkit - Complete toolset for implementing commercial business applications. It includes the equivalent of all Bootstrap JavaScript components, all html5 input types with widgets fallbacks, advanced editable components like DataGrid, TreeView, DetailView, ModalDetail, DetailList. All components have default customizable templates, and support virtualizazion and Drag & Drop. Component rendering is meta-data driven, so component configuration is in part automatic, and in part can be driven with data annotations. The toolset includes also query tools, to issue complex local or remote queries, changes-tracking tools to send only the changed records to the server, advanced validation attributes, globalization tools, "Behaviors" that modify existing components, state management and save, and more.
• BlazorGridstars32 - Virtualized data grid component with lean markup, focused on displaying remote data. (Demo & documentation).
• Blazor.DownloadFileFaststars5 - Fast download of files to the browser from Blazor without any javascript library reference or dependency. (Demo).
• TimeCalcstars0 - An app to help keep track of speed cubing averages on the fly using Blazor WebAssembly. Demo.

• Blazor Herostars791 - - Clean Architecture Solution Template for Blazor WebAssembly built with MudBlazor Components. This project will make your Blazor Learning Process much easier than you anticipate. Blazor Hero is meant to be an Enterprise Level Boilerplate, which comes free of cost, completely open sourced. Read the Quick Start Guide here.

• Implementing Blazor CRUD using Mudblazor Component Library in .NET 5 – Detailed Guide - February 17, 2021 - In this article, we will demonstrate implementing Blazor CRUD using Mudblazor Component Library with a more polished way to achieve the CRUD functionalities. Mudblazor is without any doubt one of the coolest and complete looking Blazor Component Libraries out there. Kudos to the Mudblazor Team! Source codestars8 .

• Integrating Tailwind CSS with Blazor – Detailed Guide - February 24, 2021 - In this article, we will be Integrating Tailwind CSS With Blazor Applications. This is a guide exclusively for the .NET devs like me who are not much into CSS, yet want to build clean-looking UIs. We will get started with building great UI components with just half (or even less than half) of the CSS knowledge you already have. Source codestars9 .
• ABlazorPongstars7 - A classic Pong in Blazor WebAssembly, with sounds, without a single line of Javascript. Demo.
• BlazorZXingJsstars2 - Barcode/QRCode Reader and QRCode writer components. This is a Blazor wrapper around zxing-js library. It supports variety of barcode and 2d code types.

• desktoploveblazorwebstars15 - desktoploveblazorwebstars15 is a cross-platform desktop application template (mobile support in the future) based on Blazor Server, which uses an in-process ASP.NET Core server + in-process OS WebView component.
• BlazorTemplaterstars28 - Use .razor components to render HTML strings for email content.

• Toast_UI.Blazor_Calendarstars13 - A fully featured calendar UI component for viewing and creating events, tasks, and milestones. Month, week, and daily views. Blazor Calendar wraps the fully featured Toast UI Calendar JS library. MIT License. Sample project.
• Blazoritystars20 - Blazor component library based on the Clarity UI design. 30+ components including Datagrid and Tree-view (Docs & Demos).
• Publish SPA for GitHub Pagesstars6 - Add this NuGet package to your Blazor WebAssembly project to easily publish it to GitHub Pages.
• WebBluetoothstars1 - Blazor service for the experimental WebBluetooth functions. Based on Blazm.Bluetoothstars19.
• WalkingTec.Mvvm (WTM)stars3.1k - A development framework based on .NET Core and EF. It supports Blazor, Vue, React and LayUI with one click code generation for CRUD, Import/Export, etc. Website.
• BlazorTimelinestars41 - Responsive, vertical timeline component.
• Board Gamesstars40 - Fusionstars930 + Blazor sample and a fully functional web app allowing you to play real-time multiplayer board games. Demostars40.

• Start Blazoring - A Blazor starter template built using your choice of Blazorise or MudBlazor, with more UI library integration coming. It offers a myriad of features such as user registration, login, password reset, two factor; user management, roles, permissioning; background workers, logging, caching, email templates, localization and many more.
• Blazor Timestars26 - Display dates and times in the users local time. Demo.
• piotr-yuxuan/malli-clistars18

• HeroTofu.com - Forms backend with bot detection and encrypted archive. Forward submissions via UI to email, Slack, or Zapier. Use your own frontend, no server code required. Free plan gives unlimited forms and 50 submissions per month.
